fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the object number of the setup table where the G/L account is used.

fields.name: Table Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Table Name of the setup table where the G/L account is used.

fields.name: Field Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the field in the setup table where the G/L account is used.

fields.name: Line
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reference to Line in the setup table, where the G/L account is used. For example, the reference could be a posting group code.

fields.name: G/L Account No.
fields.tooltip: Shows the account number of the G/L account that is used in the setup table.

fields.name: G/L Account Name
fields.tooltip: Shows the account name of the G/L account that is used in the setup table.

fields.name: Key 1
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.
